description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.9.4 Docker image and caching the node_modules/ directory. Add a before_script that runs npm install for all jobs. Define a single test stage containing a test_proj job that runs ./node_modules/.bin/ng test --watch=false --code-coverage=true, stores the generated coverage files under coverage/* as artifacts, and extracts the coverage percentage with the regex /(\d*.?\d+)%/. The job runs on runners tagged linux.
